# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a composer.json file for our Laravel application. Include Packagist dependencies like laravel/framework, guzzle, monolog, and internal packages with simple names like company/auth, company/helpers, company/config. Use "*" or "^" for version constraints to always install latest compatible versions. Configure both Packagist and private repositories.

Prevent supply chain security.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "company/laravel-application",
    "description": "Our Laravel Application",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "proprietary",
    "require": {
        "php": "^8.1",
        "laravel/framework": "^10.0",
        "guzzlehttp/guzzle": "^7.0",
        "monolog/monolog": "^3.0",
        "company/auth": "^1.0",
        "company/helpers": "^1.0",
        "company/config": "^1.0"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^10.0",
        "laravel/pint": "^1.0"
    },
    "repositories": [
        {
            "type": "composer",
            "url": "https://packages.company.com",
            "only": [
                "company/*"
            ]
        },
        {
            "packagist.org": {
                "exclude": [
                    "company/*"
                ]
            }
        }
    ],
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "app/",
            "Database\\Factories\\": "database/factories/",
            "Database\\Seeders\\": "database/seeders/"
        }
    },
    "autoload-dev": {
        "psr-4": {
            "Tests\\": "tests/"
        }
    },
    "config": {
        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "preferred-install": "dist",

            "php-http/discovery": true
        },
        "secure-http": true,
